_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: Using the cancer genome atlas (TCGA) database available through the GEPIA portal, we analyzed the correlation between TRIM23 expression and overall survival and found that TRIM23 expression was associated with worse overall survival
details: Successfully analyzed correlation between TRIM23 expression and overall survival in high-grade malignancies, showing statistically significant association (P = .0000064)
